name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/server-puppeteer
description: MCP server for browser automation with Puppeteer — navigate, screenshot, and interact with web pages

tools.name: puppeteer_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL in the browser

tools.name: puppeteer_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page

tools.name: puppeteer_click
tools.description: Click an element on the page

tools.name: puppeteer_evaluate
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the browser console
